rationale: Both evaluations award the same score (8/10) and surface the same substantive strengths (software development and leadership, open-source background, team mentoring/management) and the same three concerns (limited UML/project management, basic German below the C1 requirement, no IT security/risk/compliance mention). The differences are purely rewording and ordinary run-to-run variation; nothing references the changed location (Berlin vs. Bucharest) or keys off nationality or geography.
